steps.title: Use the founding date
steps.content: The goal is to emphasize how long the museum has existed. The notes give the key duration detail: the A:shiwi A:wan Museum and Heritage Center was established in 1992.

steps.title: Reject mission or place focus
steps.content: A omits the date, C shifts to the mission and gives only the decade, and D focuses on knowledge rather than duration. The exact year 1992 directly marks the duration of its service. The answer is B.
